name: Synthetic Rubber Bridge; Building Systems to USEEIO
description:
Bridge process to transparently convert from physical units, in USLCI, to values in 2012 producer price for connecting to background data in the USEEIO repository. 
This is a copy of the equivalent bridge from USLCI to USEEIO.

processDocumentation.dataTreatmentDescription:
Conversions to USD assumes purchaser price of $1775 per metric ton. Purchaser prices are in 2023 dollars. The 2023 Rho matrix values (most recent available), which reflect CPI price year ratios, for the appropriate NAICS sector are used to convert current dollars to the model year (2012) of USEEIO version 2.0. Phi matrix values, which reflect producer-to-purchaser price ratios, for the appropriate NAICS sector are used to convert purchaser price data to producer prices to reflect the basis of USEEIO version 2.0.



2012 Producer Price = 2023-2025 purchaser price * (2023 Rho/2012 Rho) * 2012 Phi



Utilized ratios - NAICS code: 325211/US, 2023 Rho: 0.820856737791723, 2012 Rho: 0.934564829783565, 2012 Phi: 0.873075313099367

flow.name: Synthetic rubber and artificial and synthetic fibers
